firesmoke.title: Fire / Smoke
firesmoke.footnote: Deployed model: yolov8m, 768px, 40 epochs on the merged cubeai + sayedgamal99 set. Baseline mAP50 was measured on the original cubeai val set and the fine-tuned model on the merged val set — different yardsticks, so this is a provisional comparison. Baseline only has mAP50 recorded (others n/a).

ppe.title: PPE
ppe.footnote: Both models evaluate on the same Roboflow PPE Combined v4 validation set (8,814 images), so this is a direct, valid comparison. The yolov8m retrain at 768px lifted mAP50 0.774 -> 0.785 and mAP50-95 0.501 -> 0.518, mainly via higher recall (0.815 -> 0.837).
